name: Pineapple- Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup unsweetened coconut flakes,  see note
1/2 Cup unsweetened pineapple chunks, drained & diced
3/4 Cup apple, peeled, cored and diced
1/2 Cup unsweetened pineapple chunks, drained and diced
3 extra large eggs or 6 egg whites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan.
2. To Make the topping: In a medium-sized bowl place coconut and premoisten. Stir and set aside.
3. Dice pineapple and measure out 1/2 cup, placing in hand strainer over a small bowl and pressing lightly with a spoon to reduce moisture content. Set aside to drain.
4. Combine apple and coconut, add cinnamon and chopped nuts, stirring in drained pineapple and mixing well; set aside.
5. To Make Batter: Measure out a generous half cup of pineapple chunks, draining as above.
6. In a large bowl combine eggs (or egg whites), oil and apple juice concentrate, beating for 1 minute.
7. Add drained pineapple and stir; then mix in cinnamon. Add flour a little at a time, stirring after each addition, and beat well by hand for at least 2 minutes.
8. Stir in baking soda quickly and then mix on low speed until combined (28-30 beats). Immediately pour into prepared pan.
9. Using your hands, sprinkle topping over batter and bake for 28-29 minutes or until a cake tester comes out clean.
10. Remove pan from oven and place on a wire rack until completely cooled.
